eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 06:46 PM ON MAY 14, 2026 Effective until 04:46 AM MAY 15, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Mesa Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Mesa Police Department is looking for white female, Anneliesse Dahlin 13 years old 5 foot 1 inch, 120 pounds, brown hair, brown eyes, and wears gold rim glasses. Last seen wearing a blue jacket, blue polo shirt, blue jeans, and black boots.  Anneliesse was last seen on foot 05/14/2026 in the area of Guadalupe Road and Signal Butte Road in Mesa. She suffers from a medical condition that may cause confusion. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
